title: Absolut Revive
description: Revolutionize multiplayer death: fall into a KO state instead of dying! Get revived by your allies, or get your inventory looted by your enemies.
body:
![AbsolutRevive banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64736a13f8a85650b022bce85169adcb5036d480_0.webp)

**Quick Overview** No more instant death and scattered equipment! AbsolutRevive puts you in a **KO (Unconscious)** state when your health drops to zero.

**Cooperation:** Your allies have 90 seconds to save you with their bare hands or a Defibrillator.

**Betrayal:** Your enemies can open your inventory to loot you, then execute you.

Ideal for RP, PvP/Factions servers, or hardcore cooperative survival!


<details>
<summary>Unconscious state</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92cda0fae64e8c8fe068681f9d992bee9afd3ce9_0.webp)

</details>



## Main Features

### Fluid and Realistic KO Animation

When your health drops to zero, you do not die immediately. Your character collapses to the ground with a **clean and perfectly synchronized 3D animation** (arms, legs, and skin layers adapt perfectly to the ground).

- During this time, you can no longer move or open your inventory.

- Monsters stop attacking you, giving you a chance to be saved.

- Total immersion: your vision darkens and you hear your heartbeat slow down.

- You have 90 seconds before succumbing to your wounds.

**Searchable Inventory (Looting)**

This is the major innovation of the mod. When a player is KO, any other player can approach and right-click to **search their inventory**.


<details>
<summary>Loot system</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8784e0a9051bf38d115d7aa3fed6be82431e11d1_0.webp)

</details>



- A custom graphical user interface (GUI) opens.

- The looter can view and interact with the victim's armor, main hand, off-hand, and full inventory.

- "Searching" sound effects are played to alert nearby players.

- Perfect for taking hostages, stealing loot, or conversely, securing the equipment of a fallen ally.

### Defibrillator and Revive

A KO player can be saved in two ways:

1. **Bare hands (Slow revive): **An ally sneaks next to you for **8 seconds**. You stand up with 2 hearts of health.

2. **With the Defibrillator (Emergency revive):** An ally sneaks with the new Defibrillator item in hand. The rescue only takes **3 seconds**, plays an electric shock sound effect, and the victim stands up with 4 hearts of health.

- The Defibrillator has 3 uses before breaking.


<details>
<summary>Defibrillator Usage</summary>

![Defibrillator used](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04586fca0076abcb4e76e293a572d4648e2721ea.png)
</details>



### Give Up

No allies nearby? Stuck in a hopeless situation? Hold the **Give Up** key (configurable) for 3 seconds to end your suffering and respawn at your spawn point.

### Totem of Undying Compatibility

The mod respects Vanilla mechanics. If you take a fatal blow while holding a **Totem of Undying**, the Totem activates first. You recover health, benefit from your potion effects, and completely avoid the KO state.

## Crafting and Recipes

**Defibrillator** The essential tool for the combat medic.

- 4x Iron Ingots

- 2x Redstone Dust

- 2x Copper Ingots

- 1x Golden Apple (in the center)


<details>
<summary>Defibrillator Recipe</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c631b40d5ecb80beb4b123695e3dd446add92e5.png)

</details>



_(The mod is 100% compatible with **JEI / REI** to view the recipe and read the item's usage instructions)._

## Installation

### Requirements:

- Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric)

- Fabric Loader

- Fabric API

### How to install:

1. Download the latest version of the mod from the Versions tab.

2. Download Fabric API.

3. Place the .jar files in the mods folder of your game or server.

4. Launch the game.

_(Note: The mod must be installed **on both the server and the clients** for animations and interfaces to work properly)._

### License and Open Source

This project is entirely **Open Source** and distributed under the **GNU License** (General Public License). Feel free to check the source code, fork it, or contribute to its development on our GitHub repository.
